title: CENTRAL OREGON FIRE INFORMATIONAL WEBSITE - 211info
text: OREGON AND WASHINGTON WILDFIRE INFORMATION CENTRAL OREGON FIRE INFORMATIONAL WEBSITE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides an online interactive map of active fires and air quality. Also offers opt-in text sign up for emergency alerts. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable 888777 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Text Short Code 888777 Text COFIRE To Sign Up For Text Alerts INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Deschutes, Crook, and Jefferson Counties Services: Fire Advisories Other Services Offered At This Location: DISASTER SERVICES - NORTHWEST WILDFIRE INTERACTIVE WEB MAP DISASTER SERVICES - OREGON OFFICE OF EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT EVACUATION MAP DISASTER SERVICES - OREGON WILDFIRE RESPONSE AND RECOVERY WEBSITE DISASTER SERVICES - REAL-TIME ASSESSMENT AND PLANNING TOOL FOR OREGON MATERIAL GOODS - FIRE HARDENING GRANT PROGRAM PUBLIC SAFETY - OREGON SMOKE INFORMATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
